title: Remove applyTo from instruction files
description: Update YAML frontmatter of 5 instruction files to remove `applyTo: '**'` and ensure keyword-rich `description` fields exist for on-demand discovery. This eliminates ~538 lines of always-loaded context from every Copilot interaction. Each file keeps its existing `name` and `description` fields but removes the `applyTo: '**'` line. Descriptions must include domain-specific keywords so VS Code loads them only when relevant (e.g., "halt gate, boot sequence, memory gate, security baseline" for core).
acceptance_criteria: Given the 5 instruction files, when I inspect their YAML frontmatter, then none contain `applyTo: '**'`
Given a simple user question like "what is 2+2", when Copilot processes it, then zero instruction files are auto-loaded into context
Given a user question about "ticket dependencies", when Copilot processes it, then only ticket-system.instructions.md loads via description match
